NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-28-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
POS OF ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF HAROLD SIPAI FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. CLAIMANT SHALL SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 610, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM GRANTED, THE CLAIM OF HAROLD SIPAI SHALL BE STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER STRIKING THE CLAIM OF: HAROLD SIPAI

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. People of the State of California's Motion for order for terminating sanctions and striking claim granted, the claim of Harold Sipai shall be stricken. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Assitant District Attorney, for petitioner and moving party: People of the State of California

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant shall serve complete verified responses and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
